pixel_eqs_str: a['thresh']=((above(a['bass_att'], a['thresh'])*2)+((1-above(a['bass_att'], a['thresh']))*(((a['thresh']-1.3)*0.96)+1.3))); a['dx_r']=(((equal(a['thresh'], 2)*0.015)*Math.sin((5*a['time'])))+((1-equal(a['thresh'], 2))*a['dx_r'])); a['dy_r']=(((equal(a['thresh'], 2)*0.015)*Math.sin((6*a['time'])))+((1-equal(a['thresh'], 2))*a['dy_r'])); a['crude']=(2*Math.abs(((12*Math.sin((a['rad']-(div(1,12)*a['rad']))))*(4*a['rad'])))); a['arc']=Math.cos((2*Math.cos((1-Math.abs(Math.tan(((2*a['rad'])-Math.sin((12*a['rad']))))))))); a['cinc']=((above(Math.sin(a['bass_att']), 1)*a['arc'])+(below(Math.sin(a['bass_att']), 2)*a['crude'])); a['rot']=(a['rot']+(0.01*a['arc'])); a['zoom']=(a['zoom']+(0.001*(a['crude']-a['arc']))); a['dx']=(a['dx']+(a['dx_r']*a['cinc'])); a['dy']=(a['dy']+(a['dy_r']*a['cinc']));
